title: rubus × pullus
intro: Rubus × pullus, also known as the black raspberry hybrid, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Rubus argutus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × pullus include its high content of antioxidants, anthocyanins, and ellagic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × pullus include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, certain cancers, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Rubus × pullus can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
